---
name: Mission pack proposal
about: Propose a safe school or CTF mission pack
title: "[mission-pack] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Audience

School level, student profile, estimated lesson length.

## Learning objective

What should the student understand after the mission?

## Lab scope

Allowed simulated hosts, files, logs or services.

## Student actions

Commands or UI steps the student should perform.

## Safety guardrails

What must be blocked or explained?

## Assessment

How should the game score completion, mistakes, evidence handling and explanation?
